nodes.name: Tullberg's woodpecker
nodes.summary: Tullberg's woodpecker (Campethera tullbergi) is a species of bird in the family Picidae. It is found in western Cameroon, adjacent Nigeria, and Bioko island. The common name and Latin binomial commemorates the Swedish zoologist Tycho Fredrik Hugo Tullberg (1842-1920). References Further reading External links Avibase Tanzania Birds AVoCet
